errors.google_client_not_found: No petsFollow client account for this email. Ask your vet for an invite

errors.payout_no_ready_lines: No ready-to-pay lines in this period

success.confirm_email_sent: A confirmation email has been sent.
success.password_reset_sent: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has been sent.
success.password_reset: Password updated. You can sign in.
success.vet_invite_sent: If a veterinarian matches this email, they will be added to your practices.
success.app_link_sent: The app download link was sent to the client.
success.journey_unsubscribed: You have been unsubscribed from the discovery email journey.

defaults.auto_reply_unavailable: I am unavailable, I will get back to you shortly.

emails.confirm_registration_preheader: Activate your petsFollow Pro account in one click.
emails.confirm_registration_intro: Welcome to petsFollow Pro. To activate your practice account and start monitoring your cardiac patients, please confirm your email address.
emails.confirm_registration_expiry: This confirmation link expires in 48 hours.
emails.confirm_registration_disclaimer: If you did not request this registration, you can safely ignore this email.
emails.password_reset_preheader: Reset your petsFollow password in one click.
emails.password_reset_intro: A password reset was requested for your account. Click the button below to choose a new password.
emails.password_reset_disclaimer: If you did not request this reset, ignore this email. Your password remains unchanged.
emails.heartrate_validated_subject: petsFollow Pro — Heart rate reading validated
emails.heartrate_validated_preheader: A heart rate reading was validated — BPM {bpm}.
emails.heartrate_validated_intro: A heart rate reading was validated for a patient. BPM: {bpm}.
emails.heartrate_validated_disclaimer: Sign in to petsFollow Pro to review the patient record.
emails.new_message_preheader: You received a new client message.
emails.new_message_intro: You received a new message from a client.
emails.new_message_disclaimer: Sign in to petsFollow Pro to reply.
emails.app_download_subject: Your vet invites you to petsFollow
emails.app_download_intro: {vetName} from {practiceName} invites you to download the petsFollow app to monitor your pet's health and stay in touch with the practice.
emails.app_download_disclaimer: If you were not expecting this email, you can ignore it.
emails.visit_request_disclaimer: Sign in to petsFollow Pro to confirm or propose another slot.
emails.footer_powered_by: petsFollow — powered by LL-IT Software & Computer

d0_welcome.subject: Welcome to petsFollow
d0_welcome.intro: Your vet prescribed petsFollow: cardiac monitoring without a device, right on your phone. Download the app to get started.
d0_welcome.detail:
What you can do:
• Heart readings 15 / 30 / 60 s
• Secure messaging with your practice
• Timeline and care reminders
• Under €3 / month per pet
d0_welcome.disclaimer: You can turn off these emails using the link at the bottom.

d1_activate.subject: Activate your pet's monitoring
d1_activate.preheader: Create your pet profile and choose a plan.
d1_activate.intro: To activate prescribed monitoring, create your pet's profile and choose a plan. We recommend the 3-year plan (€95) — about €2.6 / month.
d1_activate.detail:
Plans incl. VAT:
• €35 / year
• €95 / 3 years (recommended)
• €145 / 5 years (one-time)
d1_activate.disclaimer: Without payment, heart monitoring stays pending.

d2_first_measure.subject: Ready for your first reading?
d2_first_measure.preheader: Learn how to measure your pet's heart rate.
d2_first_measure.intro: Today, take your first heart reading. Keep your pet calm, place your hand on the chest and tap with each beat for the set duration (15, 30 or 60 s depending on the practice).
d2_first_measure.detail: Tip: a relaxed pet gives a more reliable reading. Then validate to share the result with your vet.
d2_first_measure.disclaimer: If unsure, contact your practice via messaging.

d4_routine.subject: Build a monitoring routine
d4_routine.preheader: Reminders help you stay on track.
d4_routine.intro: A good routine makes the difference: enable reading and care reminders (vaccine, deworming, check-up…). Your vet sees the history in the record.
d4_routine.detail: Care+ option (€19 / year): medications and custom reminders if your pet has regular treatment.
d4_routine.disclaimer: Optional add-ons are managed in the app.

d6_vet_link.subject: Your vet is one message away
d6_vet_link.preheader: Your readings are shared with the practice.
d6_vet_link.intro: Validated readings join the timeline shared with your vet. Use messaging to ask a question or send a photo.
d6_vet_link.detail: Tip: keep the thread for the same pet for clearer follow-up.
d6_vet_link.disclaimer: Your practice may be temporarily unavailable; an automatic reply will notify you.

d10_visits.subject: Request a visit between consultations
d10_visits.preheader: Schedule a visit with your practice from the app.
d10_visits.intro: Need to see the vet again? Request a visit from the app. You'll get a notification when the slot is confirmed.

d14_checkpoint.subject: Your first 2 weeks check-in
d14_checkpoint.preheader: A quick recap of what petsFollow includes.
d14_checkpoint.intro: It's been 14 days: readings, messaging, timeline and reminders are included in your pet plan. Keep measuring as advised by your practice.
d14_checkpoint.detail: Included: 15/30/60 s readings · messaging + push · timeline · reminders · FR/NL/EN/ES
d14_checkpoint.disclaimer: Thank you for trusting petsFollow with your pet's care.

d30_habit.subject: One month in — keep the pace
d30_habit.intro: One month already! Regular readings enrich your pet's record and help your vet between visits.
d30_habit.detail: Several pets? The Family option (€39 / year) gives a household view and −10% from the 2nd pet (no cap). Exclusive with Kennel.
d30_habit.disclaimer: Options are managed in the app settings / subscriptions.

d45_care_plus.subject: Care+: medications & custom reminders
d45_care_plus.intro: If your pet is on treatment, Care+ (€19 / year) adds medications and custom reminders in the app — on top of standard care reminders.
d45_care_plus.disclaimer: Annual recurring option, cancellable from the payment portal.

d60_horse.subject: Horse pack: farrier, fecal & competitions
d60_horse.intro: You care for a horse: the Horse pack (€39 / year) adds farrier and fecal reminders, professional contacts and a competition calendar.
d60_horse.disclaimer: Annual option for accounts with at least one horse.

d75_kennel.subject: Kennel: fast encoding for breeders
d75_kennel.intro: With 6+ pets, Kennel (€119 / year) speeds up encoding (batch entry) and applies −15% on pet plans. Exclusive with Family.

d90_quarter.subject: 3 months with petsFollow — timeline matters
d90_quarter.intro: Three months of data: timeline, messages and readings form a useful record between visits.
d90_quarter.detail: With 2–5 pets, Family (€39 / year) simplifies the household view (−10%). Exclusive with Kennel.

d120_seasonal.subject: Think about seasonal care
d120_seasonal.intro: Depending on the season, some care returns: vaccination, deworming, dental check… Open the Care tab and keep reminders up to date.
d120_seasonal.disclaimer: Your vet remains the reference for the care schedule.

d180_midyear.subject: Mid-year: your follow-up at a glance
d180_midyear.preheader: Timeline, readings and messages form your record.
d180_midyear.intro: Halfway through the year, review your pets' timeline and check that subscriptions are current. The payment portal lets you manage a recurring plan.
d180_midyear.disclaimer: For billing questions, use the Stripe portal from the app.

d270_reengage.subject: We'd love to see you back in petsFollow
d270_reengage.preheader: A short reading brings follow-up up to date.
d270_reengage.intro: It's been a while without a validated reading. A short heart reading helps your vet keep useful follow-up — it only takes seconds.
d270_reengage.disclaimer: If you no longer use the app, you can unsubscribe from the journey below.

d330_prerenew.subject: Your petsFollow monitoring continues
d330_prerenew.intro: In the coming weeks, check your pet plan end date. The 3-year plan (€95) remains the best duration / price balance for lasting prescribed follow-up.
d330_prerenew.disclaimer: The payment portal is available from the pet profile.
d330_prerenew.intro_near: Your annual plan is nearing renewal. Check the end date and consider the 3-year plan (€95) for lasting prescribed follow-up — about €2.6 / month.

d365_anniversary.subject: 1 year with petsFollow — thank you!
d365_anniversary.preheader: One year of prescribed monitoring, without a device.
d365_anniversary.intro: Happy journey anniversary! Thank you for trusting petsFollow with your pet's cardiac follow-up. Consider renewal — the 3-year plan (€95) is ideal to continue with peace of mind.
d365_anniversary.disclaimer: The whole petsFollow team thanks you.

evt_pending_payment.subject: Finish activating your pet
evt_pending_payment.preheader: A pet is still waiting for plan payment.
evt_pending_payment.intro: A pet profile was created but plan payment is not complete. Finish checkout to activate readings and sharing with your vet.

evt_past_due.subject: Action needed: subscription payment
evt_past_due.preheader: A petsFollow subscription payment is past due.
evt_past_due.intro: We could not collect a subscription payment. Update your payment method via the portal to avoid interrupting monitoring.
evt_past_due.disclaimer: Contact your bank or use the Stripe portal from the app.

evt_inactive_hr.subject: A quick reading to get back on track
evt_inactive_hr.intro: No validated heart reading for a while. A short reading updates the record for your vet.
evt_inactive_hr.disclaimer: Turn off these emails via the unsubscribe link if you prefer.

push.visit_proposed_body: Your vet proposed an appointment for {petName}.
push.visit_reschedule_body: A new time slot was proposed for {petName}.
